channel.title: Shitposts on Peter Villano's Website
channel.description: Recent content in Shitposts on Peter Villano's Website

item.title: How we calculated 6-7 digits of pi with AI in one week
item.description:
Here at whatever giant tech company, we have nothing better to do. Our core product is essentially complete, and we’ve achieved market saturation. A/B testing has revealed that we can make our product much worse before users attempt to cancel their subscriptions. Unfortunately, the rollout of these changes must be gradual, and it will be multiple quarters before our app is completely unusable.

In the meantime, we are trying to look busy by adopting AI. We even built a data center. The space, previously a home for endangered species, now houses billions of dollars of GPUs, spread across dozens of servers. It is powerd by a tarrif-subsidized coal power plant, the first coal power plant built in the US since 2013. However, normal operations have been under capacity. Without sufficient load on the generators, coal has been piling up outside the power plant. The massive pile threatens to literally bury our investment, when it should be dissipating harmlessly into the atmosphere.
